postCreateCommand.gemini-key: mkdir -p ~/.gemini && ([ -n "$GEMINI_API_KEY" ] && echo "GEMINI_API_KEY=$GEMINI_API_KEY" > ~/.gemini/.env && echo '✅ GEMINI_API_KEY saved' || echo '⚠️  GEMINI_API_KEY not set')
postCreateCommand.jupyter-config: jupyter lab --generate-config -y && sed -i -e "s/# c.ServerApp.ip = 'localhost'/c.ServerApp.ip = '0.0.0.0'/" -e "s/# c.ServerApp.port = 0/c.ServerApp.port = 8888/" -e "s/# c.ServerApp.open_browser = False/c.ServerApp.open_browser = False/" -e "s/# c.ServerApp.allow_origin = ''/c.ServerApp.allow_origin = '*'/" -e "s/# c.ServerApp.token = '<DEPRECATED>'/c.ServerApp.token = ''/" -e "s/# c.ServerApp.password = ''/c.ServerApp.password = ''/" -e "s/# c.IdentityProvider.token = ''/c.IdentityProvider.token = ''/" ~/.jupyter/jupyter_lab_config.py && echo '✅ jupyter_lab_config.py configured via sed'
